statement.markdown: Given a binary tree root, implement a function to get the preorder traversal of the tree. Note that the traversal should start from the root.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be a binary tree represented as a Node class, each node having a value, left child, and right child.
statement.outputFormat: The preorder traversal of the binary tree should be returned as a list of node values.
statement.notes: You can assume that the tree nodes have unique values and the tree is not empty.

examples.explanation: The preorder traversal of the binary tree is [1, 2, 3]
